evidence.text: Moderately to severely active rheumatoid arthritis diagnosed by rheumatology specialist Dr. Patel.
Completed trial of conventional disease modifying antirheumatic drug methotrexate lasting 16 weeks.
Chart documents inadequate response to the conventional disease modifying therapy despite dose optimization.
Tuberculosis screening with interferon gamma release assay completed 4 months before biologic initiation; result negative.

Completed trial of conventional disease modifying antirheumatic drug methotrexate lasting 6 weeks.
Chart documents inadequate response to the conventional disease modifying therapy.
Tuberculosis screening with interferon gamma release assay completed 2 months before biologic initiation; result negative.
